/usr/bin/c++ -pthread -fPIC -DNDEBUG -Wall -Wextra -Wl,-Bstatic -lcarla_client -lrpc -lboost_filesystem -Wl,-Bdynamic -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/spiral_planner.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/spiral_planner.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spiral_planner.dir/behavior_planner_FSM.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spiral_planner.dir/motion_planner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spiral_planner.dir/cubic_spiral.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spiral_planner.dir/spiral_base.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spiral_planner.dir/integral.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spiral_planner.dir/spiral_equations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spiral_planner.dir/cost_functions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spiral_planner.dir/utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/spiral_planner.dir/velocity_profile_generator.cpp.o -o spiral_planner   -L/usr/local/lib  -L/home/zenardi/Documents/develop/sdc-c5-planning-starter/project/starter_files/libcarla-install/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib:/home/zenardi/Documents/develop/sdc-c5-planning-starter/project/starter_files/libcarla-install/lib -lz -lssl -luv -luWS libcarla-install/lib/libboost_filesystem.a libcarla-install/lib/libboost_program_options.a libcarla-install/lib/libboost_python38.a libcarla-install/lib/libboost_system.a libcarla-install/lib/libcarla_client.a libcarla-install/lib/librpc.a libcarla-install/lib/libDebugUtils.a libcarla-install/lib/libDetour.a libcarla-install/lib/libDetourCrowd.a libcarla-install/lib/libDetourTileCache.a libcarla-install/lib/libRecast.a -lgtest -lglog -lboost_filesystem -llapack
